Contact

Talk to the Enerium team.

Use the right contact channel below for product support, privacy requests, or legal and compliance questions.

General Support

Product questions, partnerships, waitlist requests, and general support.

hello@enerium.app

Privacy Requests

Data access, deletion, export requests, and privacy-related questions.

Legal and Compliance

Terms, legal notices, compliance, and policy-related communication.
